mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_operation_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND (operator LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR module LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR operation LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR request_uri LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, operator, module, operation, request_uri, request_method, request_params, ip, duration, result, error_message, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_operation_log WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log (operator, module, operation, request_uri, request_method, request_params, ip, duration, result, error_message, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{operator}, #{module}, #{operation}, #{requestUri}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestParams}, #{ip}, #{duration}, #{result}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_operation_log operator = #{operator}, module = #{module}, operation = #{operation}, request_uri = #{requestUri}, request_method = #{requestMethod}, request_params = #{requestParams}, ip = #{ip}, duration = #{duration}, result = #{result}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_operation_log SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
